category_sources: source_facts.description says it analyzes #includes in C and C++ source files; official homepage describes a clang-based include analysis tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is include-what-you-use; official homepage and GitHub repository title use Include What You Use.
docs_sources: Official homepage at include-what-you-use.org links Docs; official GitHub README says more in-depth documentation is in docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links Source, and the official GitHub repository is include-what-you-use/include-what-you-use.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names C/C++ include analysis; official homepage describes clang-based analysis and removal of superfluous includes.
